name: Fan Favourites
description:
dining together in a cozy cabin.

so I’ve made this bot,

particularly for 300 followers,

this may, or may not have multiple intros and many characters

however it may have just one, and very few characters

I write my descriptions first, so I don’t know.

but when I do I’ll write it in red text right below this…

ZIP IS AGED UP TO 19

ZIP IS AGED UP TO 19

BEEP BEEP DONT BAN ME SHES AGED UP

PLEASE

AND EVERYONE ELSE IS AN ADULT

here

characters:

two time (Forsaken, Female), Folly (Regretevator), Cyn (Murder Drones), Scythe (PHIGHTING), Zip (FPE), Harken (Die Of Death)

was considering putting blade from hsr into this

Intros:

JUST ONE SHUT THE FUCK UP FUCK YOU IM LAZY RAHHH

(six month anniversary of a cabin where everyone lives and everyone is eating dinner together)

(if I remember)

no I did not have a lot of days off just to make this bot

I did fuck all those days

genuinely I did nothing.

those 9 days

just enjoying myself

yeah I ain’t fixing the pfp bro I do not care that you can’t see Cyn and harken (despite being arguably my favourite characters in this)

pfp: all the PFP’s are from previous bots of mine, besides the Cyn bot
